# Meridian Health
> Specialist upper GI, bariatric, and metabolic care in Fitzroy, Victoria.

/: Home — overview of Meridian GI and Metabolic Health, services, and navigation hub
/clinical-pathways/: Clinical Pathways — hub for all specialist surgical and medical care pathways
/clinical-pathways/upper-gi-surgical-care/: Upper GI Surgical Care — oesophageal, gastric, and reflux surgery pathway
/clinical-pathways/bariatric-surgery/: Bariatric Surgery — weight-loss surgery pathway including sleeve gastrectomy and gastric bypass
/clinical-pathways/metabolic-medicine/: Metabolic Medicine — non-surgical metabolic and obesity medicine pathway
/specialists/: Our Specialists — profiles of the Meridian surgical and medical team
/the-practice/: The Practice — about Meridian GI and Metabolic Health, our approach, and facilities
/membership/: Membership — Meridian membership programme details and benefits
/app/: Patient App — information about the Meridian patient mobile app for care-journey support
/contact/: Contact — clinic address, phone, email, and location details
/consultation/: Request a Consultation — book an initial specialist consultation
/privacy: Privacy Policy — how Meridian GI and Metabolic Health collects, uses, and protects patient and visitor information
